name: Banzaicon
description:
Banzaicon is a long-running Norwegian pop-culture convention based in Larvik (Vestfold). It is a 3-day festival covering anime, manga, fantasy, sci-fi, film, TV, comics, video games, LARP, board games, cosplay and K-pop.

Each edition has a theme; recent editions have been held at Bølgen Kulturhus in central Larvik.
notes: Logo is the BC14 lockup including theme '& Mortals' and date overlay '9.–11. Oktober' — keep that in mind when displaying alongside other event metadata. Banner is a stage photo from BC13 (cosplay performance). Squarespace CDN serves WebP transparently regardless of the .png/.jpg URL extension; both files saved as .webp.
